76	// ResolveTriagePolicy returns the effective triage policy for this config,
77	// layering any `triage.policies` entries on top of the binary default
78	// ladders. Unknown failure-mode names and unknown action names are
79	// silently dropped (schema validation surfaces typos at load time).
80	func (c *NewConfig) ResolveTriagePolicy() triage.TriagePolicy {
81		policy := triage.DefaultPolicy()
82		if c == nil || c.Triage == nil || len(c.Triage.Policies) == 0 {
83			return policy
84		}
85		for modeStr, actionStrs := range c.Triage.Policies {
86			mode, err := triage.ParseFailureMode(modeStr)
87			if err != nil {
88				continue
89			}
90			ladder := make([]triage.Action, 0, len(actionStrs))
91			for _, a := range actionStrs {
92				act, err := triage.ParseAction(a)
93				if err != nil {
94					continue
95				}
96				ladder = append(ladder, act)
97			}
98			if len(ladder) == 0 {
99				continue
100			}
101			policy.Ladders[mode] = ladder
102		}
103		return policy
104	}

169		// transition before the execute-loop forces the worker to give up. Parsed
170		// via time.ParseDuration (e.g. "6h"). Empty string uses the built-in
171		// default (6h). See SD-024 §Config extensions §WorkersConfig.
172		NoProgressCooldown string `yaml:"no_progress_cooldown,omitempty" json:"no_progress_cooldown,omitempty"`
173		// MaxNoChangesBeforeClose caps the number of consecutive no_changes
174		// attempts the execute-loop tolerates before closing the bead as
175		// no-progress. Zero or unset uses the built-in default (3). Negative
176		// values are treated as unset.
177		MaxNoChangesBeforeClose *int `yaml:"max_no_changes_before_close,omitempty" json:"max_no_changes_before_close,omitempty"`
178		// HeartbeatInterval is how often a claim owner refreshes its heartbeat
179		// while holding a bead. Parsed via time.ParseDuration (e.g. "15s"). Empty
180		// string uses the built-in default that matches bead.HeartbeatInterval
181		// (30s today).

185	// Default values for WorkersConfig resolvers. These mirror the hardcoded
186	// constants the execute-loop uses today; bead 6/7 of SD-024 wires the
187	// resolvers into the loop.
188	const (
189		defaultNoProgressCooldown      = 6 * time.Hour
190		defaultMaxNoChangesBeforeClose = 3

194	// ResolveNoProgressCooldown returns the effective no-progress cooldown for
195	// this config. Defaults to 6h when unset or unparseable.
196	func (w *WorkersConfig) ResolveNoProgressCooldown() time.Duration {
197		if w == nil || w.NoProgressCooldown == "" {
198			return defaultNoProgressCooldown
199		}
200		d, err := time.ParseDuration(w.NoProgressCooldown)
201		if err != nil || d <= 0 {
202			return defaultNoProgressCooldown
203		}
204		return d
205	}

460	// ApplyDefaults ensures all required fields have default values
461	func (c *NewConfig) ApplyDefaults() {
462		if c.Version == "" {
463			c.Version = "1.0"
464		}
465		if c.Library == nil {
466			c.Library = &LibraryConfig{
467				Path: ".ddx/plugins/ddx",
468				Repository: &RepositoryConfig{
469					URL:    "https://github.com/DocumentDrivenDX/ddx-library",
470					Branch: "main",
471				},
472			}
473		} else {
474			if c.Library.Path == "" {
475				c.Library.Path = ".ddx/plugins/ddx"
476			}
477			if c.Library.Repository == nil {
478				c.Library.Repository = &RepositoryConfig{
479					URL:    "https://github.com/DocumentDrivenDX/ddx-library",
480					Branch: "main",
481				}
482			} else {
483				if c.Library.Repository.URL == "" {
484					c.Library.Repository.URL = "https://github.com/DocumentDrivenDX/ddx-library"
485				}
486				if c.Library.Repository.Branch == "" {
487					c.Library.Repository.Branch = "main"
488				}
489			}
490		}
491		if c.Bead == nil {
492			c.Bead = &BeadConfig{}
493		}
494		if c.PersonaBindings == nil {
495			c.PersonaBindings = make(map[string]string)
496		}
497		if c.UpdateCheck == nil {
498			c.UpdateCheck = &UpdateCheckConfig{
499				Enabled:   true,
500				Frequency: "24h",
501			}
502		} else {
503			if c.UpdateCheck.Frequency == "" {
504				c.UpdateCheck.Frequency = "24h"
505			}

func TestExecutionCleanup_PreservesActiveItems(t *testing.T) {
	projectRoot := setupExecutionCleanupProjectRoot(t)
	tempRoot := t.TempDir()
	now := time.Now()
	oldTime := now.AddDate(0, 0, -10)

	// Execution dir: old but active (referenced by run-state).
	activeAttemptID := "20260101T000000-aabbccdd"
	activeSessionID := "sess-aabbccdd"
	activeDir := setupEvidenceDir(t, projectRoot, activeAttemptID, oldTime)

	require.NoError(t, WriteRunState(projectRoot, RunState{
		BeadID:    "ddx-active",
		AttemptID: activeAttemptID,
		SessionID: activeSessionID,
		StartedAt: now.UTC(),
	}))

	// Agent log: old but session_id matches active run-state.
	agentLogsDir := filepath.Join(projectRoot, ".ddx", "agent-logs")
	require.NoError(t, os.MkdirAll(agentLogsDir, 0o755))
	activeLogPath := filepath.Join(agentLogsDir, "agent-"+activeSessionID+".jsonl")
	require.NoError(t, os.WriteFile(activeLogPath, []byte(`{"type":"start"}`+"\n"), 0o644))
	require.NoError(t, os.Chtimes(activeLogPath, oldTime, oldTime))

	// Worker dir: old but PID is alive (current process).
	workersDir := filepath.Join(projectRoot, ".ddx", "workers")
	activeWorkerDir := filepath.Join(workersDir, "worker-alive")
	require.NoError(t, os.MkdirAll(activeWorkerDir, 0o755))
	statusJSON := fmt.Sprintf(`{"id":"worker-alive","pid":%d,"state":"running"}`, os.Getpid())
	require.NoError(t, os.WriteFile(filepath.Join(activeWorkerDir, "status.json"), []byte(statusJSON), 0o644))
	require.NoError(t, os.Chtimes(activeWorkerDir, oldTime, oldTime))

	mgr := NewExecutionCleanupManager(projectRoot, &executionCleanupTestGitOps{})
	mgr.TempRoot = tempRoot
	mgr.RetainDays = 7
	mgr.Now = func() time.Time { return now }

	summary, err := mgr.Cleanup(context.Background())
	require.NoError(t, err)

	assert.DirExists(t, activeDir)
	assert.Equal(t, int64(0), summary.RemovedExecutionDirs)
	assert.True(t, hasObservationClass(summary.Observations, "preserved_active_evidence_dir"))

	assert.FileExists(t, activeLogPath)
	assert.Equal(t, int64(0), summary.RemovedAgentLogs)
	assert.True(t, hasObservationClass(summary.Observations, "preserved_active_agent_log"))

	assert.DirExists(t, activeWorkerDir)
	assert.Equal(t, int64(0), summary.RemovedWorkerDirs)
	assert.True(t, hasObservationClass(summary.Observations, "preserved_active_worker_dir"))
}

func TestExecutionCleanup_DeletesOldAgentLogs(t *testing.T) {
	projectRoot := setupExecutionCleanupProjectRoot(t)
	tempRoot := t.TempDir()
	now := time.Now()
	oldTime := now.AddDate(0, 0, -10)

	agentLogsDir := filepath.Join(projectRoot, ".ddx", "agent-logs")
	require.NoError(t, os.MkdirAll(agentLogsDir, 0o755))

	oldAgentLog := filepath.Join(agentLogsDir, "agent-sess-deadbeef.jsonl")
	oldSvcLog := filepath.Join(agentLogsDir, "svc-sess-deadbeef.jsonl")
	keepLog := filepath.Join(agentLogsDir, "agent-sess-recent.jsonl")
	otherFile := filepath.Join(agentLogsDir, "mirror.log")

	require.NoError(t, os.WriteFile(oldAgentLog, []byte(`{"type":"start"}`+"\n"), 0o644))
	require.NoError(t, os.WriteFile(oldSvcLog, []byte(`{"type":"start"}`+"\n"), 0o644))
	require.NoError(t, os.WriteFile(keepLog, []byte(`{"type":"start"}`+"\n"), 0o644))
	require.NoError(t, os.WriteFile(otherFile, []byte("log line\n"), 0o644))

	require.NoError(t, os.Chtimes(oldAgentLog, oldTime, oldTime))
	require.NoError(t, os.Chtimes(oldSvcLog, oldTime, oldTime))
	// keepLog: leave at current time (recent)
	require.NoError(t, os.Chtimes(otherFile, oldTime, oldTime))

	mgr := NewExecutionCleanupManager(projectRoot, &executionCleanupTestGitOps{})
	mgr.TempRoot = tempRoot
	mgr.RetainDays = 7
	mgr.Now = func() time.Time { return now }

	summary, err := mgr.Cleanup(context.Background())
	require.NoError(t, err)

	assert.NoFileExists(t, oldAgentLog)
	assert.NoFileExists(t, oldSvcLog)
	assert.FileExists(t, keepLog)
	assert.FileExists(t, otherFile) // non-matching file preserved
	assert.Equal(t, int64(2), summary.RemovedAgentLogs)
	assert.True(t, hasObservationClass(summary.Observations, "removed_agent_log"))
}

data.text:
All 7 required tests pass. The commit is clean with pre-commit hooks passing.

Here's a summary of what was delivered:

**`cli/internal/agent/execution_cleanup.go`:**
- Changed `defaultEvidenceRetainDays` from 7 → 90
- Renamed `RemovedEvidenceDirs` → `RemovedExecutionDirs`; added `RemovedAgentLogs` and `RemovedWorkerDirs` to `ExecutionCleanupSummary`
- Added `pruneAgentLogs`: prunes old `agent-*.jsonl`/`svc-*.jsonl` files, skipping any whose session ID matches a live run-state
- Added `pruneWorkerDirs`: prunes old `.ddx/workers/<id>/` dirs, skipping any with a live PID in `status.json`
- Both methods are no-ops when `RetainDays == 0`
- Called from `Cleanup` after `pruneEvidenceDirs`

**`cli/internal/agent/execution_cleanup_loop.go`:** Updated log/telemetry fields for the renamed/new counters.

**`cli/internal/config/types.go`:** `ApplyDefaults` now sets `RetainDays=90` (was 7).

**`cli/internal/agent/execution_cleanup_test.go`:** Renamed 4 tests to the required names, added 2 new tests (`DeletesOldAgentLogs`, `DeletesOldWorkerDirs`), extended existing tests to cover all three prune paths.
